name: FVG Pullback
entryRules:
Enter long when a bullish Fair Value Gap forms on the 5-minute chart during the first 2 hours of the NY session (09:30–11:30 ET).

Wait for price to retrace into the FVG zone (between the gap high and gap low).

The 1-hour bias must be bullish — price above the 50 EMA on the 1H chart.

Only take gaps formed within the current session (discard overnight gaps).
exitRules:
Take profit at 2:1 reward-to-risk.
Stop loss is placed 1 tick below the bottom of the FVG zone.
If price hasn’t hit TP after 2 hours, close at market.
filterRules:
Only trade Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday.
Skip if session ATR is below 0.3% of price (choppy conditions).
No new entries in the last 30 minutes of the session.
Halt trading for the day if daily P&L hits -2%.

name: ORB Breakout
entryRules:
Define the opening range as the first 30-minute candle range (09:30–10:00 ET high and low).

Enter long when price breaks above the opening range high with a 5-minute close above it.
Enter short when price breaks below the opening range low with a close below it.

Volume on the breakout candle must be at least 1.5x the 10-bar average volume.
exitRules:
Target is 1x the opening range size projected from the breakout.
Stop loss at the opposite side of the opening range.
Move stop to breakeven once the 1:1 target is hit, then trail.
filterRules:
No trades on Monday or Friday.
Skip if the opening range is wider than 0.8% of price.
Avoid earnings days.
Daily loss limit: -2%.

name: AMD — ICT Sweep
entryRules:
Identify the overnight range: high and low formed between 18:00 and 09:30 ET.

Accumulation: price sweeps below the overnight low in the first 90 minutes (stop hunt / liquidity grab).

Manipulation: a sharp reversal candle closes back above the overnight low — confirming the sweep was a fake-out.

Distribution entry: enter long on the first 15-minute candle that breaks above the prior swing high after the reversal.
Confirm with a bullish Fair Value Gap on the 5-minute chart near entry.
exitRules:
Primary target: overnight high (full AMD cycle).
Partial exit (50%) at 1.5:1 R:R, move stop to breakeven.
Full exit at overnight high or 12:00 ET, whichever comes first.
filterRules:
Overnight range must be at least 0.3% of price to be valid.
No trades on FOMC, CPI, NFP event days.
Best signal days: Tuesday–Thursday.
Daily loss limit: -2%.
